steps.name: expo-init
steps.summary: Expo 52 + TypeScript strict 스켈레톤 생성. expo-router, expo-constants, expo-linking, expo-asset 설치. expo-doctor 17/17 체크 통과.

steps.name: nativewind-tokens
steps.summary: NativeWind v4 + tailwindcss 셋업. tailwind.config.js(디자인 토큰 11색 + 타이포 + 간격 + 라운드) + src/theme/tokens.ts(shadow 5종 + gradient + fontWeight + HOT_MULTIPLIER_THRESHOLD=2.0) 단일 출처 확립.

steps.name: expo-router
steps.summary: Expo Router 5 라우트 placeholder (_layout, (tabs)/{index,settings}, onboarding, compare/[cityId], detail/[cityId]/[category])
